subject: License addition for oof,multicloud,esr

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

If you are modifying an existing license then you need to do it as follows:

Modifications Copyright (C) 2018 <Company Name(s)>

Additional information can be found on the following URL:
https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/Rules+for+implementing+FOSS+in+a+project?focusedCommentId=38110843#comment-38110843

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

(2 comments)

As Catherine mentioned, wherever you are adding a new company to an existing license you need to follow the rules here: https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/Rules+for+implementing+FOSS+in+a+project

section: Multiple contributors

Please correct all the files where you are adding an additional company (there are many)
